## Analysts Issue Commentary on GE Vernova and Timken

Headline is thin on content; pair with the GEV earnings miss cluster today for a fuller picture of how analyst sentiment is being tested by an operational shortfall on a name central to the data center power supply thesis.

- A Globe and Mail roundup covers analyst insights on GE Vernova (GEV) and Timken Company (TKR); no specific ratings, price targets, or financial figures are stated in the headline.
